name: tomcat
explanation: Tomcat is a JMX-based check that inherits JMXFetch (template: instances/jmx). The shipped auto_conf.yaml supplies host/port via Autodiscovery (%%host%%:9012), but production Tomcat JMX endpoints are almost always secured with JMX user/password authentication (set via -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.authenticate=true and a passwords file). Per procedure pattern D and the documented rule that JMXFetch integrations always need host+port+user+password, this falls into impossible/credentials-required. The localhost-no-auth case works only for unsecured dev/test servers.
notes: JMX integration; per procedure shortcut, classify as impossible. Default JMX port is 9012 in the spec, though Tomcat's documented default RMI port is 9010/9012/8050 depending on docs.
